evals.prompt: I need a statistical infographic on global AI market size and growth projections for our department's annual report. Pull accurate up-to-date numbers, don't make them up.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-infographics in statistical mode with research enabled (--type statistical --research): runs the optional Perplexity Sonar research phase to gather accurate 2023-2026 facts and figures, generates the infographic with Nano Banana Pro, and has Gemini 3 Pro review it against the report document-type threshold (8.0/10) with smart iteration that stops early once the threshold is met. Output is a versioned PNG plus a research JSON and a review log.

assertions.value: Uses the --research flag to source real statistics rather than inventing numbers, and reviews quality against a document-type threshold before finishing.

evals.prompt: Make me a timeline infographic of our lab's milestones from 2010 to 2025 in a corporate style for the homepage.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-infographics in timeline mode (--type timeline --style corporate): generates a chronological infographic with date markers and event nodes via Nano Banana Pro, Gemini 3 Pro reviews quality and iterates only if below the document-type threshold, and outputs a versioned PNG with a review log.

evals.prompt: I want a side-by-side comparison infographic of electric vs hydrogen vehicles for a conference handout, and it has to be colorblind-safe.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-infographics in comparison mode with an accessible palette (--type comparison --palette wong): produces a side-by-side comparison graphic using Wong's colorblind-safe palette, generated by Nano Banana Pro and quality-reviewed by Gemini 3 Pro against the document-type threshold with smart iteration.

assertions.value: Selects a colorblind-safe palette (e.g. wong) and produces a comparison-type layout.

evals.prompt: Can you build a process infographic showing the five steps of our podcast production workflow for a social media post?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-infographics in process/how-to mode (--type process, social-oriented style): generates a numbered step-by-step graphic with directional flow via Nano Banana Pro, reviewed by Gemini 3 Pro against the social document-type threshold (7.0/10) with early stopping when met.

assertions.value: Selects the process (--type process) preset for a numbered step-by-step workflow rather than a generic image.

evals.prompt: I need a CONSORT participant flow diagram for my randomized controlled trial paper, showing 500 screened, 150 excluded, and 350 randomized into two arms.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-scientific-schematics. A CONSORT methodology flowchart for a peer-reviewed paper is a technical scientific diagram, which the skill's own 'Use scientific-schematics instead' guidance routes to alterlab-scientific-schematics rather than the infographic generator.

evals.prompt: Generate a photorealistic hero image of a researcher working at a holographic lab bench for our grant website banner.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-generate-image. This is general non-infographic visual content (a photorealistic illustration), not a data-story graphic with sourced figures or a designed information layout, so it belongs to alterlab-generate-image.
